All Classes and Interfaces|All Packages|Constant Field Values|Serialized Form

E

edit(ReservationDTO) - Method in class client.view.ReservationListController
Launches the on-screen edit flow for one reservation, replacing the old popup dialog: a three-step wizard — Edit Details → Review → Settlement — with a step indicator, rendered in place of the list.
EditFlow(ReservationDTO) - Constructor for class client.view.ReservationListController.EditFlow
Creates the wizard for one reservation, snapshotting the current view.
email - Variable in class common.dto.VisitorDTO
Contact email on file, or null if none recorded.
emailField - Variable in class client.view.GuideRegisterController
Guide email input.
emailField - Variable in class client.view.ReservationCreateController
Contact email input (notification target).
emailField - Variable in class client.view.SubscriberRegisterController
Subscriber email input.
ensureConnectedThen(Runnable) - Method in class client.view.UserLoginController
Connects first if there's no live socket yet (first login), then runs the credential submit; a re-login after logout reuses the existing connection and goes straight to submit.
ENTER_VISIT - Enum constant in enum class common.dto.RequestType
Admit a visitor against a confirmed reservation at the gate.
enteredAt - Variable in class common.dto.VisitDTO
Entry timestamp (DB DATETIME as string).
enterVisit(int, long) - Method in class client.service.NetworkService
Admits a visitor against a CONFIRMED reservation (PARK_EMPLOYEE only — the server re-checks the role and that the gate operates the employee's own park).
entity - Variable in class common.dto.ServerEvent
Logical entity name affected (e.g.
entity - Variable in record class common.dto.SubscriptionKey
The field for the entity record component.
entity() - Method in record class common.dto.SubscriptionKey
Returns the value of the entity record component.
entityId - Variable in class common.dto.ServerEvent
Primary-key identifier of the affected row.
entityId - Variable in record class common.dto.SubscriptionKey
The field for the entityId record component.
entityId() - Method in record class common.dto.SubscriptionKey
Returns the value of the entityId record component.
entryBtn - Variable in class client.view.GateController
Entry: admit-by-reservation button.
entryCodeField - Variable in class client.view.GateController
Entry: confirmation-code input.
entryMode - Variable in class client.view.GateController
Container of the Entry-mode cards.
entryResult - Variable in class client.view.GateController
Entry: reservation result/toast label.
entryTab - Variable in class client.view.GateController
Tab selecting Entry mode.
entryVisitorField - Variable in class client.view.GateController
Entry: visitor-id input.
equals(Object) - Method in record class client.app.Navigator.Screen
Indicates whether some other object is "equal to" this one.
equals(Object) - Method in record class client.view.CancellationsReportController.ParkOption
Indicates whether some other object is "equal to" this one.
equals(Object) - Method in record class client.view.MainShellController.NavItem
Indicates whether some other object is "equal to" this one.
equals(Object) - Method in record class client.view.ReservationCreateController.ParkOption
Indicates whether some other object is "equal to" this one.
equals(Object) - Method in record class client.view.UserLoginController.Quick
Indicates whether some other object is "equal to" this one.
equals(Object) - Method in record class client.view.VisitsReportController.ParkOption
Indicates whether some other object is "equal to" this one.
equals(Object) - Method in record class common.dto.SubscriptionKey
Indicates whether some other object is "equal to" this one.
error(String, Throwable) - Static method in class server.util.ServerLog
Logs a located error: prints "<context>: <message>" followed by the full stack trace to System.err.
errorCard(String, String) - Method in class client.view.DashboardController
Card shown when a metric request fails, surfacing the server's message.
errorLabel - Variable in class client.view.UserLoginController
Error message label.
errorLbl - Variable in class client.view.ReservationListController.EditFlow
Inline validation/error label.
EventBus - Class in client.net
Process-wide bus that dispatches ServerEvents pushed from the server to interested local subscribers on the JavaFX Application thread.
EventBus() - Constructor for class client.net.EventBus
Private: use EventBus.getInstance().
EventBus.Subscription - Class in client.net
Handle returned by EventBus.subscribe(common.dto.SubscriptionKey, java.util.function.Consumer<common.dto.ServerEvent>) so callers can detach themselves without holding references to the underlying callback or key.
EventOp - Enum Class in common.dto
Kind of change carried by a ServerEvent on the realtime push channel.
EventOp() - Constructor for enum class common.dto.EventOp
 
EVERYONE - Static variable in class client.view.MainShellController
Visible to any logged-in identity.
executor - Variable in class server.scheduler.SchedulerService
Runs the scheduled job sweeps on daemon threads.
EXIT_VISIT - Enum constant in enum class common.dto.RequestType
Record a visitor's exit, closing their open visit.
exitBtn - Variable in class client.view.GateController
Exit: record-exit-by-reservation button.
exitCodeField - Variable in class client.view.GateController
Exit: confirmation-code input.
exitedAt - Variable in class common.dto.VisitDTO
Exit timestamp (DB DATETIME as string), or null while still inside.
exitMode - Variable in class client.view.GateController
Container of the Exit-mode cards.
exitResult - Variable in class client.view.GateController
Exit: reservation result/toast label.
exitTab - Variable in class client.view.GateController
Tab selecting Exit mode.
exitVisit(Integer, Long) - Method in class client.service.NetworkService
Records a visitor's exit, closing their open visit (PARK_EMPLOYEE only).
exitVisitByTicket(int) - Method in class client.service.NetworkService
Records a casual walk-in's exit by its ticket number (PARK_EMPLOYEE only).
exitVisitorField - Variable in class client.view.GateController
Exit: visitor-id input.
expireOverdueOffers() - Method in class server.control.ReservationController
Sweeps every grab offer whose deadline has passed: the offeree forfeited, so each lapsed entry is removed, its now-orphaned WAITING reservation is CANCELLED (via ReservationDAO.updateStatus(int, common.dto.ReservationStatus), which also stamps status_changed_at), and the grab is advanced to the next eligible waiting party for that same park/date (via ReservationController.offerGrabToNext(int, java.lang.String)).
expireOverdueOffers(boolean) - Method in class server.control.ReservationController
Force-aware variant of ReservationController.expireOverdueOffers().
expireUnconfirmedReservations() - Method in class server.control.ReservationController
Auto-cancels every PENDING reservation that was reminded to confirm but did not do so within SchedulerConfig.getConfirmTimeoutMinutes() minutes.
expireUnconfirmedReservations(boolean) - Method in class server.control.ReservationController
Force-aware variant of ReservationController.expireUnconfirmedReservations().
expiry - Variable in class client.view.WaitlistController.TickTarget
When this offer expires.
